name: m3u8-preview-go-web
description: Frontend workspace for m3u8-preview-go. 与 Go 后端通过 /api/v1 反代通讯。

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w client
scripts.dev:all: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "cd .. && go run ./cmd/server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:all:hot: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta --kill-others-on-fail "cd .. && air" "npm run dev -w client"
